title: Make test fails on stable
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
```
$ ... # follow git install instructions up to but not including make install
$ make test
```

```
$ ./bin/verilator --version
Verilator 4.228 2022-10-01 rev v4.228-28-g04fff7ebd
```
What OS and distribution are you using?
Linux/Debian
